title: Change the titles of the X and Y axes on widgets to custom titles
excerpt: I wish to change the titles of the X and Y axes to custom titles, so it won’t be ‘Count’, or ‘Sum’, or the titles on my boards.

posts.author: Chen_Lissan (Chen)
posts.cookedHtml: I wish to change the titles of the X and Y axes to custom titles, so it won’t be ‘Count’, or ‘Sum’, or the titles on my boards.
